name: Chicken in Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a skillet.
2. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper; coat in flour.
3. Add chicken to the skillet; cook 4 minutes per side.
4. Pour off drippings from the skillet.
5. Add wine, bay leaf, and lemon zest.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low.
7. Cover and simmer until chicken is tender and juices run clear, about 12 minutes.
8. Transfer chicken to a plate.
9. Increase heat to high; bring pan juices to a boil.
10. Cook until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
11. Stir in scallions and butter.
12. Pour sauce over chicken; sprinkle with parsley.
Makes 4 servings
Total time: 20 minutes
Ready-to-serve time: 30 minutes
